subcodes.first_line: O dear friends! Praise be to God, we are all well and safe under the shelter of divine patronage and protection.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان عزیز الحمد لله در پناه صون حمایت الهی جمیع محفوظ و در نهایت روح و
subcodes.subjects: @unity of governments; political unity, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
